note: language-neutral: decode base64url → bytes → checkAuthorityProofBytes(package, config); assert result and (for a negative) that reason contains code.

vectors.note: genuine corroborated proof
quorum basis in aeq; support carries no quorum
pretty-printed (non-canonical) package bytes
duplicate JSON keys collapse on parse, fail round-trip
invalid UTF-8 package bytes
a JSON array is not a { term, witnesses } package
a constructor outside RULE_CONTRACTS

a coordinate param on QuorumAgreement (must derive from πChain)
a node carrying `expected`

a padded (non-canonical) checkpoint_authority pub

whitespace-prefixed (non-canonical) config bytes
